prompt: Write a FUNCTION= expression for a one-sided contact force that activates when a part's CM falls below Z = 0 (i.e., hits a floor at Z=0). The contact should have stiffness 1e5, exponent 1.5, damping 50, and penetration depth 0.1 mm.

assertions.text: Uses the IMPACT() function (not BISTOP or a manual IF expression)
First arg uses DZ or similar displacement measuring penetration below floor
Second arg uses VZ or matching velocity measure
Threshold value is 0.0 (or equivalent contact point)
Stiffness 1e5, exponent 1.5, damping 50, penetration 0.1 all present
Expression wrapped in double quotes as required for FUNCTION= parameter
